positions.title: Engineering Manager
activity: Architects scalable software for that is used by millions of people every month
Writes new features using REST APIs (Laravel backend) and Single Page Applications (React)
Runs engineering team responsible for maintaning and scaling product

positions.title: Lead UI Engineer
activity: The lead of the UI efforts for my engineering team
Created and maintained Single Page Applications
Integrated apps with enterprise systems (domain-driven design)

positions.title: Course Engineer
activity: Focused on CodeSchool.com brand
Wrote tests to make users' code run proprietary courses platform
Produced and presented content for courses on technologies such as React & Angular (v.2+)
Spoke at conferences sharing insight into the software development industry

positions.title: Sr. UI Engineer
activity: Developed large-scale JavaScript application using AngularJS
Integrated application with in-house API using OAuth
Assisted the API team to produce good RESTful standards

positions.title: Software Engineer
activity: Created User Interfaces from strict requirements with Yeoman, AngularJS and Semantic UI
Hybrid phone applications using Ionic Framework
Extended existing proprietary PHP framework to support Restful APIs
Unit tested PHP and JavaScript code

positions.title: Software Engineer
activity: Full stack developer, primarily used Zend Framework & AngularJS
Managed A/B and user research tests in order to optimize UI/UX, resulting in increased conversions
Managed design contests involving more than 30 designers at a time.
Implemented new workflow processes including GruntJS, Sass
Responsive design slicing with strict cross-browser compatibility requirements (>IE8)

positions.title: Full Stack Developer
activity: Developed websites using ModX, Drupal and Wordpress

Developed marketing system that generated thousands of leads using multiple top-level domain names to generate thousands of websites with many different themes, uncountable numbers of pages; which were based on synonym spun articles, geo-location, etc. This SEO system was built with the LAMP Stack, serving dynamic top-level domain names. We also experimented with many different forms of caching including APC, MongoDB, Redis, Memcached, and even flat files

Built CRM system that enabled the sales team to manage the leads that were captured from the SEO system, with features such as e-mail auto-responders, call back and events alerts, lead-capturing reports, graphs, etc.

positions.title: Full Stack Developer
activity: Developed a web-based reservation system that worked in 4 different languages: English, Spanish, Portuguese and French
The reservation system included an administration panel that enabled hotel administrators to tweak room prices as needed throughout the year
They were also able to manage the reservations that came in, and to generate reports to control what marketing campaigns worked best
The whole package was built using PHP and MySQL as the backend engine, and (x)HTML, CSS and Javascript on the frontend

positions.title: Freelance developer and IT Consultant
activity: Assisted many businesses around the Central Florida area by developing websites and web-apps, designing flyers, posters and business cards, managing Windows networks and repairing computers and laptops. Software used: Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Fireworks, Illustrator, Dreamweaver and Flash), Corel Draw, NuSphere PhpED.

positions.title: Full Stack Developer
activity: Responsible the magazine’s complete web presence by developing and maintaining their website, ecommerce store, e-mail newsletters and SEO.

Website included a custom CMS that enabled magazine writers to post articles directly into the website. CMS, ecommerce store, and newsletter manager were all built from the ground up using PHP and MySQL.

accomplishments.name: Orlando Devs, Inc.
